summary: The implementation successfully addresses all 8 requirements from the BuildRequest. The backend includes Motoko data models for surahs and verses with query functions. The frontend implements React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, featuring a home page with a scrollable surah list, clickable navigation to reading pages, proper Arabic text rendering with RTL support, and a respectful visual theme using warm earth tones and deep greens. However, the backend currently contains only sample data (1 surah, 1 verse) rather than the complete 114 surahs.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend stores complete list of 114 surahs with metadata
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo file only contains sample data for 1 surah (Al-Fatiha) instead of all 114 surahs

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend stores verses with complete data for all surahs
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo file only contains 1 sample verse instead of complete verse data for all surahs

hallucinated_features.reason: The diff includes useInternetIdentity hook and InternetIdentityProvider components, but authentication was explicitly listed in non-goals
ThemeProvider with light/dark mode support was implemented but not requested in any requirement
